changelog: Create Config Group: live-fetch image/flavor names from CMP API when saved Display Name is the ID, so configurable options get friendly labels
Projects tab: added Region column to both the fetch table and the applied/saved table, auto-saved as project_regions
Removed the separate Security Groups tab from the admin navigation
Hid Nameserver 1/2 Prefix fields on the cart configure page and on the admin product-edit page for CloudPe CMP products (the previous fix only covered ns1/ns2, not ns1prefix/ns2prefix)
